Annotation Interface NativeClientIntegrationTest

@Target(TYPE) @Retention(RUNTIME) @Inherited @Documented @ContextConfiguration(initializers=K3sContextInitializer.class) @ExtendWith(NativeClientIntegrationTestExtension.class) public @interface NativeClientIntegrationTest
Author:
wind57

  • Element Details

    • namespaces

      String[] namespaces
      what namespaces to create during this test.
      Default:
      {}

    • busyboxNamespaces

      String[] busyboxNamespaces
      in what namespaces must busybox be deployed.
      Default:
      {}

    • wiremock

      NativeClientIntegrationTest.Wiremock wiremock
      in what namespaces must wiremock be deployed.
      Default:
      @org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.integration.tests.commons.k3s.NativeClientIntegrationTest.Wiremock(enabled=false)

    • withImages

      String[] withImages
      what image must be present in k3s.
      Default:
      {}

    • rbacNamespaces

      String[] rbacNamespaces
      in what namespaces to set-up RBAC.
      Default:
      {}

    • deployExternalNameService

      boolean deployExternalNameService
      deploy external-name-service.
      Default:
      false

    • deployDiscoverServer

      boolean deployDiscoverServer
      deploy discovery server.
      Default:
      false

    • deployKafka

      boolean deployKafka
      deploy kafka.
      Default:
      false

    • deployRabbitMq

      boolean deployRabbitMq
      deploy rabbitMq.
      Default:
      false

    • configurationWatcher

      NativeClientIntegrationTest.ConfigurationWatcher configurationWatcher
      configuration watcher settings.
      Default:
      @org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.integration.tests.commons.k3s.NativeClientIntegrationTest.ConfigurationWatcher(enabled=false)

    • clusterWideRBAC

      NativeClientIntegrationTest.ClusterWideRBAC clusterWideRBAC
      Default:
      @org.springframework.cloud.kubernetes.integration.tests.commons.k3s.NativeClientIntegrationTest.ClusterWideRBAC(enabled=false)
